title: She Shall Have Music
writer: Paul England, H. Fowler Mear, Arthur Macrae
actors: Jack Hylton, Jack Hylton and His Band, June Clyde
plot: Millionaire shipbuilder Freddie Gates decides to publicize his ships by hiring Jack Hylton and his orchestra to broadcast from his yacht. Brian Gates, Freddie's son, has a low-approval-rating and a high dislike for jazz music and ...
